note: Intended design: how a rendered edge flows through the pipeline and where the three fixes sit. FR1 = a light-theme edge-colour token change feeding the emit/runtime colour (fixes Issue 3 and Issue 2's primary symptom, no geometry change). FR2/FR3 = two targeted edits in shared geometry (computePerimeterPorts final-approach ⟂ side so the idle→Loading arrowhead points into the box; finishEdges/labelPoint moves the give-up label off a near-parallel run), mirrored byte-for-byte in the vnmRuntime twin. charts/before/flow.mmd captures the as-is defects at their real code sites.

diagrams.title: Intended: render-edge pipeline with FR1 (light edge token) + FR2 (⟂ final approach) + FR3 (label off parallel run), byte-parity twin

As-built: FR2 lands in a shared perpendicularizeEntry() helper on routeElbow (naive + threaded, all sides); FR3 extends resolveLabelEdgeCollisions to parallel runs; FR1 light edge #8a93a6→#69728a; + generate-heroes.mjs (D5) & cache-lookup.mmd (D6)

before.title: As-is: the three defects at their code sites (port stub · label bisected · low light-edge contrast)
